answers: Big questions: meaning of life, consciousness, morality. Explore Socrates, Aristotle, Kant.
Philosophy tackles life's biggest questions. Start with Socrates (question everything), Aristotle (virtue and reason), and Kant (duty and morality).
The meaning of existence has been debated for millennia. Existentialists like Sartre say we create our own meaning — what do you think?
Reality, consciousness, free will — these questions don't have easy answers. Reading philosophy helps sharpen your thinking, even if certainty remains elusive.

feelings.question: what is philosophy
feelings.answer: Reality, consciousness, free will — these questions don't have easy answers. Reading philosophy helps sharpen your thinking, even if certainty remains elusive.
